title: ButterflyLens — Discover, review, and strengthen Australia’s butterfly data

capture.network_policy: block all requests except the pinned local or public ButterflyLens build

requirements: record the actual pinned product rather than a mockup
review the final cut for scientific, rights, privacy, and provenance accuracy
upload the approved sub-three-minute cut to public YouTube

shots.label: ALA baseline
shots.truth_boundary: ALA is authoritative baseline occurrence evidence for this build, not complete ground truth; the public occurrence layer remains withheld.

shots.label: Flickr live stream
visual_proof: active parallel fetch and its partial outputs are not public evidence
shots.truth_boundary: The external stream is not attached to the Submitted snapshot; discovery candidates are not occurrences and partial fetch output is not shown.

shots.label: M5 pipeline
shots.truth_boundary: No authenticated M5 heartbeat, model fingerprint, committed batch, or model result is attached.

shots.label: Butterfly verification
shots.truth_boundary: The review is blind and local; revealing permitted context does not submit a decision or verify a species.

shots.label: Map update
visual_proof: No committed live replacement is attached
shots.truth_boundary: A local draft cannot update the public map; only a reviewed, rights-cleared, committed artifact can do so.

shots.label: Repeated reviewers
visual_proof: No authenticated contribution snapshot is attached
shots.truth_boundary: Independent repeated review is required for stronger evidence; the replay contains no stored community reviews or contributor identities.

shots.label: Quality interval
shots.truth_boundary: An unavailable representative interval is not zero; reference diagnostics are not population quality estimates.

shots.label: Bounded model analysis
visual_proof: Which species should receive the next reference review?
shots.truth_boundary: The Submitted answer is a deterministic stored replay; Bounded model is the bounded live analyst target and did not run for this replay.

shots.label: Geographic impact
shots.truth_boundary: No selectable impact cell is released, and withheld coverage must not be interpreted as biological absence.

shots.label: Evidence export
visual_proof: Search results are hypotheses—not biodiversity records
shots.truth_boundary: The product exposes governed export documentation, not a downloadable public occurrence archive; unreviewed Flickr candidates remain excluded.

shots.label: Codex provenance
shots.truth_boundary: Codex built and tested product code and evidence contracts; it did not create butterfly identities, community votes, or scientific ground truth.
